binance_coverage_lock_review.coverage_review_reason: Binance lock status/hash/counts verified; near-5y is listing-aware, while strict-5y is the rectangular subset.

binance_near_5y_symbol_set_review.interpretation: Near-5y completeness is listing-aware and not a strict rectangular 5y claim for every symbol.

limitations: This preview is based on Binance coverage lock metadata, not kline row validation.
No Binance kline ZIP contents were opened.
No Binance kline rows were read.
OKX overlap uses conservative exact base-asset matching only.
Multiplier/alias symbols are not automatically mapped.
Near-5y complete is listing-aware and not equivalent to strict rectangular 5y completeness.
Strict 5y completeness is narrower but better for rectangular panel construction.
External OKX metadata was read only to extract the locked 88-symbol list.
No OKX panel rows were read.
This preview is not a backtest.
This preview is not candidate generation.
This preview is not an edge claim.
This preview grants no runtime/live/capital permission.

multiplier_or_alias_potential_matches_re.review_reason: potential multiplier or alias relationship; not auto-mapped
potential multiplier or alias relationship; not auto-mapped
potential multiplier or alias relationship; not auto-mapped

okx_binance_overlap_planning.overlap_planning_reason: Conservative exact base-asset overlap computed without multiplier or alias auto-mapping.

okx_symbol_set_extraction.okx_symbol_extraction_method: discovered from repo-local EDGE_ROOT, FINAL_SUMMARY_DIR, and COMPLETE_LOCKED filename references

option_a.expected_rows_policy: sum per-symbol expected 1h rows from max(symbol first available/onboard month, 2021-05) to 2026-05-01 exclusive

panel_build_preview.recommendation_reason: Exact OKX/Binance near-5y base overlap is meaningful (>=40), so the overlap panel is the best first second-source planning target.

recommended_next_step.recommended_next_build_reason: Exact OKX/Binance near-5y base overlap is meaningful (>=40), so the overlap panel is the best first second-source planning target.

source_artifacts.okx_symbol_extraction_method: discovered from repo-local EDGE_ROOT, FINAL_SUMMARY_DIR, and COMPLETE_LOCKED filename references

source_checkpoint.project: Edge Factory OS / Binance coverage + OKX overlap planning

symbol_normalization_policy.binance_canonical_exact_base_key: baseAsset uppercased from Binance coverage lock metadata
symbol_normalization_policy.exact_overlap_rule: OKX base key must equal Binance baseAsset exactly
